Name: PaloAlto-PAN-OS
Author: Microsoft - support@microsoft.com
Description:
The [Palo Alto Networks (Firewall)](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/network-security/next-generation-firewall) Solution for Microsoft Sentinel allows you to easily connect your Palo Alto Networks Firewall logs with Microsoft Sentinel, to view dashboards, create custom alerts, and improve investigation. This gives you more insight into your organization's network and improves your security operation capabilities. This solution also contains playbooks to help in automated remediation.

This solution supports both CEF via AMA and Syslog via AMA (with DCR ingest-time transform) data collection methods. For PAN-OS 10.1 and later where CEF is no longer supported, use the Syslog via AMA connector with the provided DCR transformation to map PAN-OS syslog to CommonSecurityLog at ingestion time.

**NOTE:** Palo Alto Networks has deprecated CEF logging for PAN-OS versions after 10.0. The new Syslog via AMA connector uses an ingest-time transformation to map native PAN-OS syslog into CommonSecurityLog, ensuring full backward compatibility with all existing analytics, workbooks, and hunting queries.
Hunting Queries: Solutions/PaloAlto-PAN-OS/Hunting Queries/Palo Alto - potential beaconing detected.yaml
